title: Trade Market
subtitle: Browse potions, map keys, boss keys, and equipment listed by other players.
buyHint: To buy or sell items, open the Trade panel in the game's Hideout.
priceWatchSub: Average market prices over the last 24 hours. Use this to gauge fair value before buying or selling.
priceWatchSoon: Price history and aggregations are coming soon. For now, browse the Market tab to see current listing prices.
tradingSystemSub: The Tap of Exile marketplace lets players exchange items for gold in a secure, server-verified environment.
step1Desc: Select an item from your bag, set your asking price in gold, and publish. The item is moved to escrow and cannot be used while listed.
step2Desc: Filter the market by category, quality, subtype, and price. Sort by newest, cheapest, or quality to find what you need.
step3Desc: Found a good deal? Click "Buy" in the game to purchase instantly. Gold is deducted and the item is delivered to your bag immediately.
step4Desc: All trades are processed server-side with serializable transactions. Items are held in escrow preventing duplication or double-spend.
potionItems: Small Vial, Round Flask, Corked Flask, Tall Bottle, Wide Bottle, Jug
equipmentItems: Helmets, Armor, Boots, Gloves, Weapons, Rings, Amulets, Belts
rule2: Commission: 10% on both sides — buyer pays asking price + 10%, seller receives asking price − 10%
rule4: Listings expire after 48 hours if not sold
rule5: Expired or cancelled items return to your bag automatically
rule6: Equipped items must be unequipped before listing
rule7: Trades are scoped per league — you can only buy/sell within your active league
commissionDesc: Both buyer and seller pay a 10% commission on each trade. This helps keep the economy balanced by removing gold from circulation.
